name: Margaret Truman
description: American author of murder mysteries; daughter of 33rd President of the United States Harry S. Truman (1924-2008)
abstract: Mary Margaret Truman Daniel (February 17, 1924 – January 29, 2008) was an American classical soprano, actress, journalist, radio and television personality, writer, and New York socialite. She was the only child of President Harry S.

concerts.label: Amoco "Carnegie Hall" Broadcast: Margaret Truman with Orchestra

works.t: Gianni Schicchi: O mio babbino caro

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: Then I go to visit friends of mine, Margaret and Chappie Diederich. Margaret’s a harpist. ... I take the flugelhorn and the french horn parts over there, she accompanies me

about_quotes.speaker: Dorothy Donegan
about_quotes.evidence: I played once for Itzal Hurok (?) and Margaret Truman was there.
